title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Sam and Colby is a major creator brand building a merchandise line spanning apparel, plush, accessories, and jewelry for a large Gen Z / Gen Alpha audience.


About the Role
Sam and Colby is hiring a remote Illustrator and Designer to drive ongoing merch development, primarily apparel (hoodies, tees), producing original illustrations from creative direction and adapting them to print-ready merchandise formats.


Responsibilities

  • Produce original illustrations from creative direction and mood references
  • Adapt artwork into print-ready apparel and merch formats
  • Iterate quickly through 2-3 feedback rounds
  • Expand the line into plush, accessories, and jewelry

Requirements

  • Strong illustration skills and a relevant portfolio
  • Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Procreate
  • Fast iteration and print-production file prep
  • A feel for Gen Z / Gen Alpha visual trends

Compensation
$6,000 per month (~20 hours/week), with a path to full-time.


Location
Remote (US-based).
Notes: Title differs slightly (CSV: 'Illustrator' vs MD: 'Illustrator & Designer (Apparel)') but CSV description confirms the same apparel/merch designer role. Company, pay ($6,000/mo), remote status, and description all match.

title: Medical Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Robert Half is the world's first and largest specialized talent solutions firm, placing finance, technology, marketing, legal, and creative professionals - including medical illustration - with leading academic, healthcare, and scientific organizations.


About the Role
Robert Half is hiring a certified Medical Illustrator on a long-term contract to provide high-quality visual support for medical, scientific, and academic content, translating complex healthcare concepts into clear, accurate illustrations for publications, journals, digital platforms, and documentation. The role is fully remote with dependable communication during standard US business hours.


Responsibilities

  • Produce medically accurate illustrations for academic publications, journals, websites, and clinical or scientific documentation
  • Manage assigned projects from concept through final artwork while balancing overflow and newly initiated requests
  • Partner with faculty, department contacts, and creative stakeholders to understand subject matter and visual objectives
  • Apply institutional style and content standards, incorporating feedback through a structured quality-review process
  • Develop digital artwork across 2D, vector, and other appropriate visual formats and refine based on reviewer input

Requirements

  • Certified Medical Illustrator credential required
  • At least 3 years creating medical or scientific illustrations
  • Strong portfolio of accurate, visually compelling healthcare-related illustration
  • Proficiency with Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Creative Cloud; digital, vector, and 2D illustration (3D a plus)
  • Ability to interpret complex medical information and work within detailed brand and quality-control guidelines

Compensation
$38-$44 per hour (long-term W2 contract via Robert Half).


Location
Remote (US-based; applicants must be legally authorized to work in the United States).
skills: Medical illustration,Scientific illustration,Adobe Illustrator,Adobe Creative Cloud,Vector art,2D illustration
Notes: Title (Medical Illustrator), company (Robert Half), and salary ($38–$44/hr) all match. However, the live LinkedIn page lists the role as on-site in Houston, TX — not Remote as stated in the CSV workType. The description mentions 'supporting remote work with reliable communication' but the listing itself is classified as a location-based on-site contract. WorkType field is a mismatch: CSV says Remote, live page says On-site.

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Creatiwise is a design and branding agency with partners worldwide, designing thoughtful digital experiences and beautiful brand aesthetics. The studio produces only original, handcrafted illustration - it does not accept AI-generated artwork.


About the Role
Creatiwise is hiring a remote (work-from-home) Illustrator / all-rounder to lead the creation of high-quality, handcrafted illustrations, conceptualize visual ideas, guide creative direction, and maintain style consistency across projects in a fast-moving agency environment.


Responsibilities

  • Lead creation of high-quality, detailed original illustrations
  • Conceptualize visual ideas and guide creative direction
  • Oversee style consistency across projects
  • Mentor junior illustrators and review artwork
  • Collaborate with design, product, and marketing teams and handle complex briefs to polished final assets

Requirements

  • 1+ year (18+ months) of professional illustration experience
  • Advanced illustration and visual-storytelling skills with strong drawing fundamentals
  • Expertise with Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, CorelDRAW, Canva, and Lightroom
  • Strong creative vision, problem-solving, and project-management skills
  • Original handcrafted work only - no AI-generated artwork

Compensation
INR 2,40,000 - 5,00,000 per year.


Location
Remote (work from home).
Notes: Company (Creatiwise), salary (INR 240,000–500,000/year), and workType (Remote/Work From Home) all match. Minor title mismatch: CSV says 'Illustrator' but the live Internshala page title is 'Illustration Designer (All Rounder)'. Description content accurately reflects the live posting (handcrafted illustrations, no AI-generated art, mentoring junior illustrators). Flag title discrepancy for review.

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Putumayo Digital Media is the long-running Putumayo World Music brand, releasing world-music compilations with a signature hand-painted, folk-art cover style.


About the Role
Putumayo is hiring a freelance illustrator/painter to create original album-cover artwork for roughly 24 releases per year (work-for-hire), in a folk/naive/outsider-art aesthetic with culturally grounded, celebratory figurative imagery that reads at both streaming-thumbnail and full resolution.


Responsibilities

  • Create original hand-painted-style album covers (1-4 figures)
  • Deliver layered Photoshop files and animation-ready assets (Spotify Canvas, YouTube)
  • Match the brand's folk/naive/outsider-art aesthetic
  • Turn work around quickly and communicate independently

Requirements

  • Strong folk/naive/figurative illustration or painting portfolio
  • Adobe Photoshop and layered PSD prep
  • Culturally grounded, celebratory imagery sensibility
  • No AI-generated work (human-made only)

Compensation
$800 per album cover (work-for-hire, approximately 24 covers per year).


Location
Remote (worldwide).
skills: Folk/naive illustration,Hand-painted illustration,Adobe Photoshop,Figurative art,Animation-ready prep
Notes: Title differs slightly (CSV: 'Illustrator' vs MD: 'Illustrator or Painter') but description confirms the same Putumayo album-cover role. Company, pay ($800/project flat fee), remote, and description all match.

title: Book Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Reedsy is a global marketplace connecting authors with vetted publishing professionals, including designers and illustrators.


About the Role
Reedsy is recruiting freelance book designers and illustrators whose remit spans cover design, interior layout, typography, illustration, and production management, collaborating directly with authors to deliver professional print and digital books.


Responsibilities

  • Design book covers and interior layouts
  • Produce illustration and typography for books
  • Manage production for print and digital formats
  • Collaborate directly with authors through the platform

Requirements

  • 3+ years of book design/illustration experience
  • Portfolio of 5+ published books
  • Strong typography, layout, and illustration skills
  • Comfortable working independently with clients

Compensation
Freelancer-set rates, with payments handled via the Reedsy platform.


Location
Remote (worldwide).
Notes: Title differs slightly (CSV: 'Book Illustrator' vs MD: 'Freelance Book Designer (cover/interior)') but description confirms the same Reedsy marketplace role covering covers, interior, and illustration. No salary in CSV matches MD 'unspecified'. Remote and description align.

title: Senior Brand Designer
description:
About the Company
Flex is an AI-native private bank for business owners, offering banking, credit, payments, and personal finance, at nine-figure annualized revenue.


About the Role
Flex is hiring a Senior Brand Designer in a hands-on and strategic role owning creative across web, social, ads, and event design to build the brand and drive revenue and awareness.


Responsibilities

  • Own brand creative across web, social, ads, and event design
  • Design marketing creative that drives awareness and revenue
  • Partner across teams on a cohesive brand system
  • Produce video and motion assets as needed

Requirements

  • 3+ years of graphic design in a B2B high-growth environment
  • Strong cross-channel portfolio
  • Adobe Creative Suite and Figma fluency; video editing
  • AI-assisted design tools (e.g. Midjourney) a plus; motion/3D a plus

Location
Remote (USA).
skills: Adobe Creative Suite,Figma,Video editing,Web design,Social content,Ad design
Notes: Title, company, remote status, and description all match. No salary in CSV aligns with MD 'Unspecified'. CSV description confirms Flex fintech brand designer role consistent with MD notes.

title: Web Designer
description:
About the Company
IvyPanda is a student-success platform connecting students with academic experts and providing self-study tools.


About the Role
IvyPanda is hiring a remote Web Designer to create and edit content, design web-page layouts, update sites, define technical requirements, and establish design guidelines.


Responsibilities

  • Design web-page layouts and visual content
  • Create and update site content
  • Define technical requirements and establish design guidelines
  • Produce wireframes, prototypes, sitemaps, and user/process flows

Requirements

  • Proven web-design experience with a strong graphic-design portfolio
  • Proficiency with prototyping, visual design, and wireframing tools
  • Layout and page-design skill
  • Agile/Scrum experience

Location
Remote (worldwide).
Notes: Title, company, remote status, and description all match. No salary in CSV aligns with MD 'Unspecified'. CSV description confirms IvyPanda web designer role consistent with MD.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Company
ADG helps Western technology companies grow in China, supporting their marketing and go-to-market efforts.


About the Role
ADG is hiring a part-time, on-call Graphic Designer to support its marketing team, producing B2B sales collateral, presentations, social media assets, and website assets, with potential to grow into a longer-term engagement.


Responsibilities

  • Produce B2B sales collateral and presentations
  • Create social media and website assets
  • Iterate quickly against marketing needs
  • Collaborate with the marketing team remotely

Requirements

  • Exceptional design sense and speed
  • Strong portfolio (B2B / website work a plus)
  • Clear communication
  • Flexible, on-call availability

Location
Remote.
skills: Graphic design,B2B collateral,Presentations,Social media assets,Website assets
Notes: MD company is listed as 'ADG1' but CSV company is 'ADG' — minor discrepancy, likely a typo in MD but worth confirming. All other fields (title, remote, no salary, description content) match.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Company
Signit is a fast-growing Saudi SaaS startup building e-signature, digital-agreement, and identity-verification infrastructure.


About the Role
Signit is hiring a remote Graphic Designer to shape and maintain its brand identity, creating assets for social media, web, apps, and campaigns, plus illustrations, logos, icons, and motion graphics tailored to the Saudi market.


Responsibilities

  • Design social media, web, app, and campaign assets
  • Create illustrations, logos, and icons
  • Produce motion graphics and animation
  • Maintain and evolve the brand identity

Requirements

  • Proven graphic-design track record with a strong portfolio
  • Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, After Effects)
  • Branding and motion-graphics skills
  • Digital marketing and social content sensibility

Location
Remote.
keywords: Graphic Design,Brand Identity,Motion Graphics,Social Media,Digital Marketing
skills: Adobe Creative Suite,Branding,Logos,Motion graphics,Social media content

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Company
Idexcel is a global staffing and IT-services firm placing creative talent with enterprise clients.


About the Role
Idexcel is hiring a Senior Graphic Designer on a 6-month W2 contract to serve as the primary designer on complex print and digital communication projects, organizing messaging to business objectives and upholding visual-identity and brand standards.


Responsibilities

  • Lead complex print and digital communication projects
  • Organize messaging to business objectives
  • Uphold visual-identity and brand standards
  • Deliver multimedia, print, and digital production

Requirements

  • Expert multimedia, print, and digital production skills
  • Hands-on Adobe Creative Suite proficiency
  • Graphic-design degree or 3+ years corporate design experience
  • Strong cross-industry portfolio (role excludes UX/UI focus)

Compensation
6-month W2 contract (rate set by employer).


Location
Remote (or NYC / Charlotte, NC / Iselin, NJ).
skills: Adobe Creative Suite,Multimedia design,Print production,Typography,Layout,Brand identity
Notes: CSV title is 'Graphic Designer' but MD title is 'Senior Graphic Designer' — minor but the seniority level is a meaningful detail. CSV workType is 'Remote' while MD flags '⚠️ Remote with conditions' (EST only, physical offices listed); the CSV does not capture the conditional nature of the remote arrangement.

title: UI UX Designer
description:
About the Company
syd life AI is a London-based preventive-health and 'Life Quality' technology company that uses AI within its product.


About the Role
syd life AI is hiring a remote UI/UX Designer to create wireframes, mockups, prototypes, and developer-ready designs for web and mobile, collaborating with the Product Manager and engineers to ship user-friendly interfaces aligned to brand guidelines.


Responsibilities

  • Create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes for web and mobile
  • Produce developer-ready designs aligned to brand guidelines
  • Collaborate with the Product Manager and engineering
  • Iterate on user-friendly interface designs

Requirements

  • 1-4 years of UI/UX design experience
  • Advanced Figma skills and a strong portfolio
  • Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/JavaScript
  • Comfortable in a remote, project-based role

Compensation
Project-based contract with potential to convert to permanent.


Location
Remote.
Notes: CSV title 'UI UX Designer' vs MD 'UI/UX Designer' is cosmetic only. Company matches (syd life AI). No salary in both. Remote matches. Description confirms same health-tech UI/UX role. MD verdict is REJECT but that is an editorial decision, not a data mismatch.

title: Contemporary Artist
description:
About the Company
Arte Laguna World runs the Arte Laguna Prize, a leading international contemporary art competition.


About the Role
The 21st edition is open worldwide, to any age, with a free theme; finalists exhibit at Venice's Arsenale Nord (Nov 6-29, 2026). Entry covers up to 5 works.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: International artists, any age.
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
First prize EUR 10,000 plus partner special prizes (residencies, gallery, festival). Entry fee EUR 122 (over 35) / EUR 97.60 (under 35).


Location
Remote submission; finalists exhibit at Arsenale Nord, Venice, Italy.
Notes: CSV company is 'Arte Laguna World' but MD company is 'Arte Laguna Prize' — slightly different names for the same organisation, but worth confirming the canonical name. All other fields (no salary, remote/global, description of art competition) align.

title: Artist Residency
description:
About the Company
Loghaven Artist Residency offers fully funded residencies on 90 acres of historic log cabins in Knoxville, TN.


About the Role
Loghaven invites applications across visual arts, writing, dance, theater, music composition, architecture, and interdisciplinary practice; fellows receive a weekly stipend, travel/freight reimbursement, and lodging.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: Ages 21+, must live 120+ miles from Knoxville, and able to earn income in the US (international artists and degree-seeking students ineligible).
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
Living stipend of approximately $850/week, plus travel and freight reimbursement and a free cabin/studio. $25 application fee (waivable).


Location
On-site in Knoxville, Tennessee, USA.
Notes: CSV company is 'Loghaven Artist Residency' vs MD 'Loghaven' — minor formatting difference. CSV workType 'On-site' matches the MD flag for location-restricted residency. No salary in CSV; MD shows 'Stipend provided' which is consistent with zero numeric values. Description aligns.

title: Performance Artist
description:
About the Company
The Shelley & Donald Rubin Foundation's Sight/Geist program supports emerging NYC-based film and performance artists via The 8th Floor gallery.


About the Role
Season 7 seeks emerging artists working in moving-image and performance practices for screenings and live performances; selected artists receive stipends plus production support.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: Ages 18+, primary NYC residence, self-identified emerging artist.
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
Stipends of $300 (group screening), $500 (solo screening), or $750 (solo live performance), plus $250 toward production costs.


Location
On-site in New York City, USA (The 8th Floor gallery).
company: The Shelley & Donald Rubin Foundation / The 8th Floor
Notes: CSV company name is longer ('The Shelley & Donald Rubin Foundation / The 8th Floor') vs MD 'sdrubin.org' — different representations of the same organisation. CSV workType 'On-site' matches MD NYC-only restriction. No salary in CSV; MD shows '$300–$750 artist fees' which is a real mismatch — the CSV has salaryMin/Max both 0 and no currency, losing the fee information.

title: Willet Artist
description:
About the Company
Willet Studios, with the River Arts Alliance, presents the Willet Art Prize, a national US art competition.


About the Role
The 2026 theme is 'Quest for Gold,' inviting sport-inspired original work in painting, digital art, sculpture, glass, or mixed media, judged by an expert panel for a $20,000 prize pool with no entry fee.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: Open to artists residing in the United States.
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
$20,000 total prize pool: 1st place $10,000, 2nd place $7,000, 3rd place $2,000. No entry fee.


Location
Remote / Anywhere in the US (submission-based).
keywords: Open Call,Art Prize,Competition,Painting,Sculpture,Mixed Media,No Entry Fee,US Artists
Notes: CSV has detailed content (Willet Art Prize, $20,000 prize pool, sport theme) but MD shows 'EntryThingy' as company with 'Unknown' pay and remote, because the MD reviewer got a 403 error. The CSV data and MD data represent different states of information — the CSV appears to have successfully fetched the listing. Human should reconcile: if CSV data is accurate, MD verdict of REVIEW due to 403 may need updating.

title: Researcher Residency Artist
description:
About the Company
The Roundhouse Foundation's Pine Meadow Ranch Center for Arts & Agriculture runs an artist residency on a working ranch in Sisters, Oregon.


About the Role
The 2027 residency, themed 'Process and Material,' invites self-directed practitioners across visual arts (painting, ceramics, sculpture, fiber arts), writing, music, performance, and ecological/interdisciplinary research; residents receive a weekly stipend, travel reimbursement, and a private studio with lodging and ranch access, in 2- or 4-week sessions between March and mid-November 2027.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: US-based artists only, any career stage.
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
$200/week stipend for the full 2- or 4-week residency, plus travel reimbursement up to $300 for residents traveling 1,000+ miles. Private studio, lodging, and ranch access provided. No application fee.


Location
On-site at Pine Meadow Ranch, Sisters, Oregon, USA (260-acre working ranch).
keywords: Open Call,Artist Residency,Stipend,Arts and Agriculture,Visual Arts,Interdisciplinary,Oregon
Notes: CSV has detailed content (Pine Meadow Ranch residency, Sisters Oregon, 2027 theme) but MD shows 'Pine Meadow Ranch' with 'Unknown' pay and remote due to a SlideRoom load error. Similar to i:15, CSV and MD represent different information states. Human should verify CSV data is accurate and update MD accordingly.

title: Painting Competition Artist
description:
About the Company
The Ashtabula Arts Center hosts the annual Paul and Norma Tikkanen Painting Prize, a juried painting competition honoring abstract painter Paul Tikkanen.


About the Role
Painters working in oil, acrylic, watercolor, gouache, encaustic, ink, and mixed media compete in abstract and realistic categories for a prize pool exceeding $40,000; a digital first round runs June 1-July 15, 2026 via ArtCall.


Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit your work per the call guidelines
  • Meet the eligibility and medium requirements
  • Submit before the stated deadline
  • Follow the host's submission process

Requirements

  • Eligibility: Painters residing in named NE Ohio (Ashtabula, Cuyahoga, Geauga, Lake, Lorain, Mahoning, Medina, Portage, Summit, Trumbull) or NW Pennsylvania (Crawford, Erie, Lawrence, Mercer) counties.
  • Original work in the accepted medium(s)
  • Complete application/submission materials
  • Adherence to the submission deadline

Compensation
Over $40,000 total: two $15,000 First Place awards, two $8,000 Second Place, up to four $1,500 Honorable Mentions, and one $500 People's Choice. Entry fee $15/piece (limit 2).


Location
On-site in Ashtabula, Ohio, USA (in-person exhibition); regional eligibility.
Notes: CSV company 'Ashtabula Arts Center' vs MD 'Tikkanen Painting Prize' — different names for the same listing (the prize is hosted by the Arts Center). CSV workType 'On-site' aligns with MD's highly restricted geography flag. No salary in CSV; MD shows '$15,000 / $8,000 / $1,500 HM' prize amounts — the CSV loses this prize pool detail but the description snippet references '$40,000 prize pool' so the information is present in the description. Minor formatting difference overall.
